title: Sources table (canonical provenance)
description: Hand-authored / adapter-generated provenance catalogue. One row per (url, content_hash). Replaces per-file sources[] smearing (R6/R7) — observations reference rows here via source_id FK (D5/D6). Field set = OWID origin.* verbatim + yen-gov extensions explicitly tagged. Authored shape is JSON (PR-reviewable, D18); pipeline compiles to taxonomy/sources.parquet for DuckDB consumption.

x-changelog.description: Initial canonical sources table schema (Phase 0.3 of TODO/20260517-canonical-long-format-pivot.md). OWID origin.* fields verbatim (producer, citation_full, url_main, url_download, date_accessed, license, vintage). yen-gov extensions tagged in property descriptions: source_id (PK), content_hash, first_fetched_at, last_seen_at, confidence_tier, is_issuing_authority. Per D5/D6.

source_id.description: yen-gov extension (not OWID). PK; stable across re-fetches. Convention: 'src-<8+ hex chars of stable hash>'. Adapters generate; never renumbered.

url.description: yen-gov extension. The exact http(s)://... URL the pipeline fetched. Empty string for hand-authored content (producer='yen-gov'). Together with content_hash forms the natural dedup key before source_id is assigned.

content_hash.description: yen-gov extension. sha256 of the fetched bytes, hex, prefixed 'sha256:'. Empty string for hand-authored. Idempotency anchor: a re-fetch yielding the same hash updates last_seen_at and nothing else.

producer.description: OWID origin.producer verbatim. Publisher org (e.g. 'Election Commission of India', 'Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation', 'Reserve Bank of India'). For hand-authored: 'yen-gov'.

citation_full.description: OWID origin.citation_full verbatim. Full bibliographic citation string.

url_main.description: OWID origin.url_main verbatim. Landing / about page (often distinct from the bytes URL).

url_download.description: OWID origin.url_download verbatim. Direct download URL; equals `url` for HTML scrapes.

date_accessed.description: OWID origin.date_accessed verbatim. UTC date (YYYY-MM-DD) the pipeline first read this URL. Distinct from first_fetched_at by intent: date_accessed is OWID-conformant for citation; first_fetched_at is RFC 3339 with time.

first_fetched_at.description: yen-gov extension. RFC 3339 UTC; immutable; citizen-facing. Set once on first observation of (url, content_hash); never updated. Per D6.

last_seen_at.description: yen-gov extension. RFC 3339 UTC; updated on every re-fetch that confirms the same content_hash. Operational telemetry; NOT citizen-facing. Per D6 — dissolves the fetched_at smear.

vintage.description: OWID origin.vintage verbatim. Source's own period / revision label (e.g. 'FY 2024-25', 'Provisional Estimates', '2025 release'). Preserved as-published; never normalised.

confidence_tier.description: yen-gov extension (not OWID). gold = issuing authority publishing its own primary data (ECI, MoSPI, RBI). silver = reputable secondary republisher / research aggregator (PRS, CMIE, OWID-imported). bronze = single-paper / unverified mirror — surface with caveat. Curation discipline for Indian mixed-quality data shelves; OWID's editorial gate happens upstream of the table so they don't need this.

is_issuing_authority.description: yen-gov extension (not OWID). True iff producer is the official issuing authority for this data (e.g. ECI for election results, NCRB for crime). False for republishers. Often implied by confidence_tier=gold but explicit for the rare gold-republisher case.
